payload.answer: The input is a request to remember an external article by URL, but the source content is unavailable due to the mocked 404/network fetch failure. Only the source boundary is known: the user supplied the URL https://example.com/missing and the stated reason 'useful for memory architecture'. No article-derived memory should be created from unavailable content.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable article content could be classified because the provided URL fetch failed with a 404/network error.

details: Classified source type as external article URL.
Fetch result indicates unavailable source: 404/network error.
No memory cards created from article content.

repair_options: Ask the user to provide the article text or a working URL.
Store only a bookmark-style reference if the system supports unresolved external sources.
Retry fetching later if transient network failure is possible.
